title: Neary

'''Neary''' was a celestial body<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> located in the [[Neary system/Legends|Neary system]], a part of the [[Calaron sector/Legends|Calaron sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="Slice" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] compiled a [[SecuriDex]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] on the former [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Yurdak Fav]], which named Neary as Fav's last known location.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Neary was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Neary [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Neary itself, in grid square T-9.<ref name="EAOC" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' {{1stm}}
